Package org.eventb.ui.eventbeditor

Interface IRodinHistory

All Known Implementing Classes:
History
public interface IRodinHistory
A simplified version of the IOperationHistory dedicated to Rodin edition undoable operations.

The IRodinHistory tracks a history of rodin model operations that can be undone or redone. Operations are executed and added to the history using the ElementManipulationFacade.

This interface shall be used ONLY to redirect UNDO and REDO actions to the RodinHistory.
Since:
2.4

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addOperationHistoryListener(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IOperationHistoryListener listener)
    Adds the specified listener to the list of operation history listeners that are notified about changes in the history or operations that are executed, undone, or redone.
    String
    getNextRedoLabel(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
    Returns the label of the operation that will next be redone in the given context.
    String
    getNextUndoLabel(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
    Returns the label of the operation that will next be undone in the given undo context.
    boolean
    isRedo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
    Returns whether there is a valid redoable operation available in the given context.
    boolean
    isUndo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
    Returns whether there is a valid undoable operation available in the given context.
    void
    redo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
    Redoes the most recently undone operation in the given context.
    void
    undo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
    Undoes the most recently executed operation in the given context.

  • Method Details

    • undo

      void undo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Undoes the most recently executed operation in the given context.
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be searched for the undo operation to be executed

    • getNextUndoLabel

      String getNextUndoLabel(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Returns the label of the operation that will next be undone in the given undo context.
      Parameters:
      context - the undo context
      Returns:
      the label of the operation that will next be undone in the given undo context or an empty string otherwise

    • isUndo

      boolean isUndo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Returns whether there is a valid undoable operation available in the given context.
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be checked
      Returns:
      true if there is an undoable operation, false otherwise.

    • redo

      void redo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Redoes the most recently undone operation in the given context.
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be searched for the redo operation to be executed

    • getNextRedoLabel

      String getNextRedoLabel(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Returns the label of the operation that will next be redone in the given context.
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be redone
      Returns:
      the label of the operation that will next be redone in the given context or an empty string otherwise

    • isRedo

      boolean isRedo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Returns whether there is a valid redoable operation available in the given context.
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be checked
      Returns:
      true if there is an redoable operation, false otherwise.

    • addOperationHistoryListener

      void addOperationHistoryListener(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IOperationHistoryListener listener)
      Adds the specified listener to the list of operation history listeners that are notified about changes in the history or operations that are executed, undone, or redone.
      Parameters:
      listener - the IOperationHistoryListener to be added as a listener. Must not be null. If an attempt is made to register an instance which is already registered with this instance, this method has no effect.
      See Also:
      • IOperationHistoryListener
      • OperationHistoryEvent
